description: Lead currently lives in the property or is moving out to a new location. Property cannot be listed until they have vacated and it is guest-ready.
typical_timeline: 1-4 months depending on new property readiness
key_questions_to_ask: When do you expect to move out?
Will the property need any work before listing?
Are you leaving furniture in place?
what_to_do: Discuss property readiness and any prep needed
Send management agreement in advance — ready to sign on move-out day
Schedule photography for the week after move-out
what_not_to_do: leave a gap in contact during the move
risk_factors: lead decides not to list after seeing cost of property prep
emotional attachment to the property inhibits signing
follow_up_cadence: Every 2-3 weeks until move-out confirmed, then immediately on move-out day

notable_leads.name: Haider Ali
notable_leads.note: Certainty-seeker. Moving out. Strong candidate once clear.

notable_leads.name: Ihsan
notable_leads.note: BROTHEL TRAUMA SENSITIVITY. Moving out. Needs full guest vetting detail before signing.

notable_leads.name: Marnus
notable_leads.note: Loss-averse-switcher. Relocating. Needs income comparison to LTL.
